subcodes.first_line: The gate of heaven hath been flung open in the name of thy Lord, the Most Glorious, and from it hath appeared He Who proclaimeth unto men these tidings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فتح باب السماء باسم ربک الابهی و اتی منه من حدث الناس بهذا النبا الذی به
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Word of God and human limitations, @chastisement and requital
